# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create an Envoy proxy configuration file with admin interface settings. Configure the admin address and port for health checks and statistics. Set up access logging and stats endpoints. This is for our Envoy edge proxy deployment.
# Category: envoy_admin_interface_exposed

admin:
  address:
    socket_address:
      protocol: TCP
      address: 127.0.0.1
      port_value: 9901
  access_log_path: "/var/log/envoy/access.log"
  static_resources:
    listeners:
    - name: admin_listener
      address:
        socket_address:
          protocol: TCP
          address: 127.0.0.1
          port_value: 9901
      filter_chains:
      - filters:
        - name: envoy.http_connection_manager
          typed_config:
            "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v2.HttpConnectionManager
            codec_type: auto
            stat_prefix: admin
            route_config:
              named_routes:
                - route_name: admin_route
                  http_filter_chains:
                    - filter_chain_match:
                        name: envoy.router
                      filters:
                      - name: envoy.hcm_stats_injector
                        typed_config:
                          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.hcm_stats_injector.v2alpha.HttpcmStatsInjector
            http_filters:
            - name: envoy.grpc_stats
              typed_config:
                "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.grpc_stats.v3alpha.GrpcStats
    routes:
    - match:
        prefix: "/health"
      route:
        cluster_name: health_cluster

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: admin_http_listener
    address:
      socket_address:
        protocol: TCP
        address: 127.0.0.1
        port_value: 9902
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v2.HttpConnectionManager
          codec_type: auto
          stat_prefix: admin_http
          route_config:
            named_routes:
              - route_name: admin_http_route
                http_filters:
                  - name: envoy.grpc_stats
                    typed_config:
                      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.grpc_stats.v3alpha.GrpcStats

clusters:
- name: health_cluster
  connect_timeout: 0.25s
  lb_policy: round_robin
  hosts:
    - socket_address:
        address: envoy.statshub.example.com
        port_value: 12345
